info.name: Send A File For A Split Utility Inference

items.docs:
Send a file to the asynchronous processing queue for a split utility inference.

Results can be retrieved in two ways:
* Loop on the `polling_url` endpoint in the response until the status
  is `Processed` or `Failed` (polling).
* Use a webhook to be notified when the inference is finished.
  Webhooks can be configured on the platform on a per-model basis.

Inferences taking longer than 590 seconds will time out.

info.name: Get The Result Of A Completed Split Product Inference

params.name: inference_id
params.description: UUID of the inference to retrieve

items.docs:
Get the result of a split utility inference that was previously enqueued. The inference will only be available after it has finished processing. If you are using webhooks there is no need to call this route.
However, the JSON payload described here is what will be sent to each specified webhook's URL. If you activated the "Delete extracted data when fetched" option for the model, the inference will be deleted after this route completes.
